description: Scatter chart driven by DuckDB SQL query.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query with {{udf_name}} and $param_name placeholders. Must return 'x' and 'y'. Optional: 'series', 'size', 'label'.

defaultPointSize.description: Default point size when SQL does not return a size column.

pointStrokeWidth.description: Outline width of points in pixels.

minBubbleSize.description: Minimum rendered bubble size when using a size column.

maxBubbleSize.description: Maximum rendered bubble size when using a size column.

showGrid.description: Show subtle grid lines behind points.

showLegend.description: Show legend when multiple series are present.

xAxisFontSize.description: X-axis label font size in pixels.

yAxisFontSize.description: Y-axis label font size in pixels.

animationMs.description: Animation duration in milliseconds. 0 disables animation. Animation only plays on data changes, not on zoom/resize.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string.
